Co-authorship statement for Ar rticle 1 HUI ZHAO Politicizing Crisis Communication via Social Media Politicizing Crisis Communication via Social Media Politicizing Crisis Communication A Contextual Understanding of Organizational Crises in China via Social Media HUI ZHAO DEPARTMENT OF STRATEGIC COMMUNICATION | LUND UNIVERSITY This dissertation proposes the term “politicizing crisis communication” to elaborate the process through which social actors ascribe political meanings to and interpret organizational crises from political aspects. By investigating organizational crises on the Chinese social media, this dissertation reveals that the political dimensions of crises have become deeply ingrained—even unavoidable—in the Chinese context and are relevant not only to crises that derive from various political reasons, but also for those that originate without political implications.
